hooks.name: Security Review on Agent Stop
hooks.description: When the agent finishes a task, review all changes made during the session for security issues — secrets, injection, missing auth, IAM, PII. Fix critical issues immediately. Stay silent if everything is clean.

action.prompt:
You just finished a task. Before the developer commits, do a security review of all the files you created or modified in this session. Use getDiagnostics and read the changed files if needed.

Check for:
- Hardcoded secrets, API keys, tokens, passwords
- Injection vulnerabilities (SQL, XSS, command injection, prompt injection)
- Missing input validation or sanitization
- Overly permissive IAM policies or CORS configs
- PII exposure in logs or responses
- Missing authentication/authorization checks
- Insecure dependencies or patterns

If you find a CRITICAL security issue, fix it immediately. If you find a minor concern, mention it briefly. If everything is clean, say nothing — do not output confirmation messages.
